items.visual_description: A pair of high-waisted, wide-leg trousers in an off-white color. They feature a clean, flat front with a smooth waistband and a prominent pressed crease down the center of each leg, creating a tailored and elongated silhouette.

overall_description: This is a pair of sophisticated, high-waisted trousers in a solid off-white color. The design features a wide-leg or flared silhouette that extends from the hips to the hem, offering a fluid and elegant look.
